subcodes.title: Public address to International Peace Forum, spoken on 1912-05-12
subcodes.first_line: When we glance at history, we find that from the beginning up to the present
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون نظر بتاریخ میکنیم ملاحظه مینماایم که از اول عالم الی زماننا هذا بین بشر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @unity in diversity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @justice and wrath of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action
